---
title: "Analysis"
author: "Mayleen"
date: "2026-01-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, eval = FALSE)
```

# PanelMatch - No Interference
## Setup
For matching (just tot rev)
```{r, message = F}
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(fastDummies)

df <- readRDS("county_long.rds")
df <- df |> 
      group_by(geoid_2010) |>
      mutate(CountyID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()

# These are some socioeconomic covariates we may evaluate balance for but need to convert from string to num
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population")
df <- df |> mutate(across(all_of(covs_to_check), as.numeric)) # make sure these are numeric

# Add REGION dummy columns
df <- df |> dummy_cols(select_columns = c("REGION"), ignore_na = FALSE, remove_selected_columns = TRUE, remove_first_dummy = FALSE)

# These are the variables we will adjust for
adj_set <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "lat", "lng")

# Other variables
ntee_vars <- grep("^NTEEV2_", names(df), value = TRUE)
region_vars <- grep("^REGION_", names(df), value = TRUE)

df <- df |> dplyr::select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "geoid_2010", "treat.FEMA_nDis"), adj_set, ntee_vars, region_vars)))

# 1859 is New York County
df$treat.FEMA_nDis[((df$CountyID == 1859) & (df$TAX_YEAR == 2001))] <- NA

# log transform
#saveRDS(df |> filter(TOT_REV < 0 | TOT_ASSET < 0), "misc_analysis/no_intV1_negative.rds")
df <- df |> mutate(TOT_REV = case_when(TOT_REV < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_REV),
                   TOT_ASSET = case_when(TOT_ASSET < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_ASSET))
df <- df |> mutate(across(c("TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET"), log1p)) #log1p adds 1 first to avoid 0s

# Adding spatially varying coefficients
source("matches_helper.R")
df <- add_SVC(df, num_E_vec = 100)
df$lat <- NULL
df$lng <- NULL

df$geoid_2010 <- NULL

# https://stackoverflow.com/questions/74815244/panelmatch-r-errors-please-convert-time-id-to-consecutive-integers-and-pleas
panel_df <- PanelData(panel.data = as.data.frame(df),
                      unit.id = "CountyID",
                      time.id = "TAX_YEAR",
                      treatment = "treat.FEMA_nDis",
                      outcome = "TOT_REV")
# rm(df)

# saveRDS(panel_df, "panel_data/no_int_panelV1.rds") # No SVC
# saveRDS(panel_df, "panel_data/no_int_panelV2.rds") # Yes SVC

#write.csv(df |> select(TAX_YEAR, FEMA_threshADJ) |> unique(), "updated_threshold.csv", row.names = FALSE)
```

```{r}
sum(is.na(panel_df$treat.FEMA)) # county_FEMA_indicator <- 3.78 #2019

treatVarPlot <- DisplayTreatment(panel.data = panel_df, legend.position = "none", xlab = "TAX_YEAR", ylab = "County Code", hide.x.tick.label = TRUE, hide.y.tick.label = TRUE, dense.plot = TRUE)

treatVarPlot
#ggsave("treatment_variation_plot.png", plot = treatVarPlot, width = 7.5, height = 10, units = "in")
```

## Matching Methods - Config 1, No SVC
### Lag = 3
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV1.rds")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/no_svc/no_int_panelV1/config1/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/no_svc/no_int_panelV1/config1/NSEW_"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# Print information about matching and balances
summary(matches_list$none)
summary(matches_list$ps.match)
summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)

plot(matches_list$ps.match)
#print(matches_list$none)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# # panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV1.rds")
# extracted_matches <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, "extracted_", save_name, ".rds"))
# # plot(extracted_matches$CBPS.weight, panel.data = panel_df, include.missing = FALSE)
# names(extracted_matches$CBPS.weight)
# extracted_matches$CBPS.weight$`1.1995`
# extracted_matches$CBPS.match$`1.1995`
# weights(extracted_matches$CBPS.weight)
# weights(extracted_matches$ps.match)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```

My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA", "REGION_MIDWEST", "REGION_NORTHEAST", "REGION_SOUTH", "REGION_WEST")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
```

```{r}
ylims <- list("base" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "ntee" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "loc" = c(-0.15,0.15), "unrefined" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "all" = c(-0.15, 0.15))
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                              ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                              ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims[["unrefined"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

# p_none$base
# # p_ps.match$base_unrefined
# p_ps.match$base
# p_cbps.match$base
# p_ps.weight$base
# p_cbps.weight$base
# 
# p_none$ntee
# # p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
# p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
# p_cbps.weight$ntee
# 
# p_none$loc
# # p_ps.match$loc_unrefined
# p_ps.match$loc
# p_cbps.match$loc
# p_ps.weight$loc
# p_cbps.weight$loc
# 
# p_none$all
# # p_ps.match$all_unrefined
# p_ps.match$all
# p_cbps.match$all
# p_ps.weight$all
# p_cbps.weight$all
```

```{r}
quantile(signif(abs(bal_none$value[bal_cbps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.match$value[bal_cbps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
```



### Lag = 5
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV1.rds")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 5 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/no_svc/no_int_panelV1/config1/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/no_svc/no_int_panelV1/config1/NSEW_"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# Print information about matching and balances
# summary(matches_list$none)
# summary(matches_list$ps.match)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
# summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)
# 
# plot(matches_list$none)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# plot(extract(matches_list$CBPS.weight), panel.data = panel_df)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE, 
#      main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (No Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```


My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA", "REGION_MIDWEST", "REGION_NORTHEAST", "REGION_SOUTH", "REGION_WEST")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
```

```{r}
ylims <- list("base" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "ntee" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "loc" = c(-0.15,0.2), "unrefined" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "all" = c(-0.2, 0.2))
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                              ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                              ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims[["unrefined"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

# p_none$base
# # p_ps.match$base_unrefined
# p_ps.match$base
# p_cbps.match$base
# p_ps.weight$base
# p_cbps.weight$base
# 
# p_none$ntee
# # p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
# p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
# p_cbps.weight$ntee
# 
p_none$loc
# p_ps.match$loc_unrefined
p_ps.match$loc
p_cbps.match$loc
p_ps.weight$loc
p_cbps.weight$loc
# 
# p_none$all
# # p_ps.match$all_unrefined
# p_ps.match$all
# p_cbps.match$all
# p_ps.weight$all
# p_cbps.weight$all
```

```{r}
# print("No Matching")
# quantile(signif(abs(bal_none$value[bal_none$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
# 
# print("PS Matching")
# quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.match$value[bal_ps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
# 
# print("CBPS Matching")
# quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.match$value[bal_cbps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
# 
# print("PS Weighting")
# quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.weight$value[bal_ps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 4), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
# 
# print("CBPS Weighting")
# quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.weight$value[bal_cbps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 4), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

quantile(signif(abs(bal_none$value[bal_none$unrefined == FALSE]), 4))
quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.weight$value[bal_cbps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 4))
```



## Matching Methods - Config 1, With SVC
### Lag = 3
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV2.rds")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV2/config1/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/with_svc/no_int_panelV2/config1/NSEW_"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# Print information about matching and balances
summary(matches_list$none)
summary(matches_list$ps.match)
summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)

plot(matches_list$none)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# plot(extract(matches_list$CBPS.weight), panel.data = panel_df)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE, 
#      main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (No Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```

My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA", "REGION_MIDWEST", "REGION_NORTHEAST", "REGION_SOUTH", "REGION_WEST")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
```

```{r}
ylims <- list("base" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "ntee" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "loc" = c(-0.15,0.15), "unrefined" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "all" = c(-0.15, 0.15))
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                              ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                              ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims[["unrefined"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

# p_none$base
# # p_ps.match$base_unrefined
# p_ps.match$base
# p_cbps.match$base
# p_ps.weight$base
# p_cbps.weight$base

# p_none$ntee
# # p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
# p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
# p_cbps.weight$ntee

p_none$loc
# p_ps.match$loc_unrefined
p_ps.match$loc
p_cbps.match$loc
p_ps.weight$loc
p_cbps.weight$loc
# 
# p_none$all
# # p_ps.match$all_unrefined
# p_ps.match$all
# p_cbps.match$all
# p_ps.weight$all
# p_cbps.weight$all
```

```{r}
quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.match$value[bal_cbps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
```

### Lag = 5
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV2.rds")


# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 5 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV2/config1/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/with_svc/no_int_panelV2/config1/NSEW_"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# Print information about matching and balances
# summary(matches_list$none)
# summary(matches_list$ps.match)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
# summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)
# 
# plot(matches_list$none)
# plot(matches_list$ps.match)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# plot(extract(matches_list$CBPS.weight), panel.data = panel_df)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE, 
#      main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (No Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```


My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA", "REGION_MIDWEST", "REGION_NORTHEAST", "REGION_SOUTH", "REGION_WEST")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
```

```{r}
ylims <- list("base" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "ntee" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "loc" = c(-0.15,0.2), "unrefined" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "all" = c(-0.2, 0.2))
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                              ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                              ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims[["unrefined"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

# p_none$base
# # p_ps.match$base_unrefined
# p_ps.match$base
# p_cbps.match$base
# p_ps.weight$base
# p_cbps.weight$base
# 
# p_none$ntee
# # p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
# p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
# p_cbps.weight$ntee
# 
p_none$loc
# p_ps.match$loc_unrefined
p_ps.match$loc
p_cbps.match$loc
p_ps.weight$loc
p_cbps.weight$loc
# 
# p_none$all
# # p_ps.match$all_unrefined
# p_ps.match$all
# p_cbps.match$all
# p_ps.weight$all
# p_cbps.weight$all
```

```{r}
# print("No Matching")
# quantile(signif(abs(bal_none$value[bal_none$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
# 
# print("PS Matching")
# quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.match$value[bal_ps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))
# 
# print("CBPS Matching")
# quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.match$value[bal_cbps.match$unrefined == FALSE]), 3), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

# print("PS Weighting")
# quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.weight$value[bal_ps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 4), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

# print("CBPS Weighting")
# quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.weight$value[bal_cbps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 4), probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

quantile(signif(abs(bal_none$value[bal_none$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
quantile(signif(abs(bal_ps.weight$value[bal_ps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
```


## Estimates
Full (all outcomes)
```{r, message = F}
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(fastDummies)

df <- readRDS("county_long.rds")
df <- df |> 
      group_by(geoid_2010) |>
      mutate(CountyID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()

outcome_vars <- grep("^REV_", names(df), value = TRUE)

df <- df |> dplyr::select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "treat.FEMA_nDis", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET"), outcome_vars)))

# log transform
# saveRDS(df |> filter(if_any(all_of(c("TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", outcome_vars)), ~ .x < 0)), "misc_analysis/no_intV1_negative_stratified.rds")
df <- df |> mutate(across(c("TOT_REV", outcome_vars), ~ if_else(.x < 0, 0, .x)))
df <- df |> mutate(across(c("TOT_REV", outcome_vars), log1p)) #log1p adds 1 first to avoid 0s

df$treat.FEMA_nDis[((df$CountyID == 1859) & (df$TAX_YEAR == 2001))] <- NA
# https://stackoverflow.com/questions/74815244/panelmatch-r-errors-please-convert-time-id-to-consecutive-integers-and-pleas

panel_df <- PanelData(panel.data = as.data.frame(df),
                      unit.id = "CountyID",
                      time.id = "TAX_YEAR",
                      treatment = "treat.FEMA_nDis",
                      outcome = "TOT_REV")
# 
# panel_df2 <- as.data.frame(readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV2.rds"))

# all.equal(as.data.frame(panel_df) |> select("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "treat.FEMA_nDis", "TOT_REV"), 
#           panel_df2 |> select("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "treat.FEMA_nDis", "TOT_REV"))

rm(df)
```
### Lag = 3
Stratified by NTEE category
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV2/config1/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)
estimates_save_name <- "estimates/with_svc_no_intV2_con1_"
match_method <- "CBPS.match"

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))
m.out <- matches_list[[match_method]]

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV2.rds")

# Need to compute the estimates for each NTEE category
outcome_vars <- c("TOT_REV", "REV_ART", "REV_EDU", "REV_HMS", "REV_PSB", "REV_ENV", "REV_HEL", "REV_HOS", "REV_UNI") # REV_MMB, REV_REL, REV_ENV, REV_IFA, REV_UNU, REV_NA
```

```{r}
res <- list()
for (x in outcome_vars){
      print(x)
      attr(panel_df, "outcome") <- x
      attr(m.out, "outcome") <- x
      attr(m.out, "outcome.var") <- x
      
      res[[x]] <- PanelEstimate(sets = m.out,
                     panel.data = panel_df,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6)
}

for (x in outcome_vars){
      file_name <- paste0("estimates/", x, ".png")
      print(file_name)
      png(file_name)
      plot(res[[x]])
      dev.off()
}

file_name <- paste0(estimates_save_name, save_name, ".xlsx")
print(file_name)
estimate_summaries <- lapply(res, summary)
estimate_summaries <- lapply(estimate_summaries, as.data.frame)
write_xlsx(estimate_summaries, file_name)
```


Just total revenue
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV2/config1/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV2.rds")

# Winner: CBPS Matching with SVC Coefficients
res <- PanelEstimate(sets = matches_list$CBPS.match,
                     panel.data = panel_df,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6)
plot(res)
summary(res)
```
Misc Analysis - Distribution of Matched Set Treatment Effects
```{r}
ind.res <- get_set_treatment_effects(pm.obj = matches_list$CBPS.match,
                                     panel.data = panel_df,
                                     lead = 1:5)

hist(ind.res[[1]], main = "Distribution of Matched Set Treatment Effects\n F = 1",
     xlab = "Treatment Effect",
     ylim = c(0,100))

hist(ind.res[[3]], main = "Distribution of Matched Set Treatment Effects\n F = 3",
     xlab = "Treatment Effect",
     ylim = c(0,100))

hist(ind.res[[5]], main = "Distribution of Matched Set Treatment Effects\n F = 5",
     xlab = "Treatment Effect",
     ylim = c(0,100))
```

Pooled estimates
```{r}
# Winner: CBPS Matching with SVC Coefficients
res.pooled <- PanelEstimate(sets = matches_list$CBPS.match,
                     panel.data = panel_df,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     pooled = TRUE,
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6)
plot(res.pooled)
```

Different SE computation
```{r}
# Winner: CBPS Matching with SVC Coefficients
# res.indep <- PanelEstimate(sets = matches_list$CBPS.match,
#                      panel.data = panel_df,
#                      se.method = "conditional")
# plot(res.indep)
```

## Choosing the number of SVC
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(fields)
library(MASS)

df <- readRDS("county_long.rds")
df <- df |> 
      group_by(geoid_2010) |>
      mutate(CountyID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()

# These are some socioeconomic covariates we may evaluate balance for but need to convert from string to num
covs_to_check <- c("white_perc", "bachelors_perc", "poverty_perc", "unemployment", "med_family_income_adj", "med_household_income_adj", "total_population")
df <- df |> mutate(across(all_of(covs_to_check), as.numeric)) # make sure these are numeric

# These are the variables we will assess balance for
se_vars <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population")
other_vars <- c("TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET")
ntee_vars <- c("NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA")

df <- df |> dplyr::select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "geoid_2010", "treat.FEMA_nDis", "lat", "lng"), se_vars, other_vars, ntee_vars)))

df <- df |> mutate(TOT_REV = case_when(TOT_REV < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_REV),
                   TOT_ASSET = case_when(TOT_ASSET < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_ASSET))
df <- df |> mutate(across(c("TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET"), log1p)) #log1p adds 1 first to avoid 0s

library(data.table)
df <- arrange(df, TAX_YEAR)
df.lag <- shift(df[,7:ncol(df)], n = 1:3, give.names = TRUE)
df <- bind_cols(df, df.lag)
rm(df.lag)

df <- df |> filter(TAX_YEAR >= 1994)

df_sub <- df |> dplyr::select(CountyID, lat, lng) |> unique()

x <- cbind(df_sub$lat, df_sub$lng) # inputs: latitude and longitude

# SVC
d <- rdist(x)
K <- Matern(d, smoothness=.5) # for smoothness paramter, should we do some sort of optimization?
E <- eigen(K)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)
lls = list()
ls_list = list()
for (num_svc in seq(10,100,10)){
      curr_name <- as.character(num_svc*2)
      x_s <- cbind(x[,1] * E$vectors[,1:num_svc], x[,2] * E$vectors[,1:num_svc]) # would have to play around with this number
      
      # add SVC back into panel data
      xs_vars <- paste0("x_s", seq_len(ncol(x_s)))
      colnames(x_s) <- xs_vars
      df_sub.temp <- cbind(df_sub, x_s)
      
      df.temp <- merge(df, df_sub.temp |> dplyr::select(-lat, -lng), by = "CountyID", all = TRUE)

      upper_formula <- paste(
        "treat.FEMA_nDis ~ TAX_YEAR + bachelors_perc + med_household_income_adj + white_perc + total_population +",
        paste0(do.call(paste0, expand.grid(paste0(se_vars, "_lag_"), 1:3)), collapse = " + "), "+",
        paste0(do.call(paste0, expand.grid(paste0(ntee_vars, "_lag_"), 1:3)), collapse = " + "), "+",
        paste0(do.call(paste0, expand.grid(paste0(other_vars, "_lag_"), 1:3)), collapse = " + "), "+",
        paste(xs_vars, collapse = " + "))
      
      # regression
      ls_list[[curr_name]] <- glm(as.formula(upper_formula), data = df.temp, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
      #summary(ls)

      yweight <- predict(ls_list[[curr_name]], type="response")
      png(paste0("svc_plots/no_interference/svc", num_svc*2, "_Mar19.png"))
      plot(sort(yweight), main = paste("# SVC =", num_svc*2), cex = 0.10)
      dev.off()
} # winner was num_svc = 30 on March 10, but on March 19 200 is the winner by a landslide

library(lmtest)
my_test <- lrtest(ls_list[["100"]], ls_list[["200"]])
my_test

AIC(ls_list[["100"]], ls_list[["200"]])
BIC(ls_list[["100"]], ls_list[["200"]])

y_pred <- predict(ls_list[["200"]], df.temp, type = "response")
quantile(y_pred, na.rm = TRUE, probs = seq(0,1,0.1)) # all probs between 0.02 and 0.95
# sum(near(y_pred, 1), na.rm = TRUE)
# sort(y_pred, decreasing = FALSE) 
```

# PanelMatch - Interference
## Setup
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(haven)
library(geosphere)
library(fastDummies)
source("matches_helper.R")

df <- readRDS("county_long.rds")
df <- df |> 
      group_by(geoid_2010) |>
      mutate(CountyID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()

# These are some socioeconomic covariates we may evaluate balance for but need to convert from string to num
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population")
df <- df |> mutate(across(all_of(covs_to_check), as.numeric)) # make sure these are numeric

# Add REGION dummy columns
df <- df |> dummy_cols(select_columns = c("REGION"), ignore_na = FALSE, remove_selected_columns = TRUE, remove_first_dummy = FALSE)

# These are the variables we will adjust for
adj_set <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "lat", "lng")

# Other variables
ntee_vars <- grep("^NTEEV2_", names(df), value = TRUE)
region_vars <- grep("^REGION_", names(df), value = TRUE)

df <- df |> dplyr::select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "geoid_2010", "treat.FEMA_nDis"), adj_set, ntee_vars, region_vars)))

# log transform
df <- df |> mutate(TOT_REV = case_when(TOT_REV < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_REV),
                   TOT_ASSET = case_when(TOT_ASSET < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_ASSET))
df <- df |> mutate(across(c("TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET"), log1p)) #log1p adds 1 first to avoid 0s

# Create new treatment variable that takes a distance-based cutoff adjustment
adj_lists <- create_adj_list(panel_data = df, dist_cutoff = 25)

res <- add_exposed(panel_data = df, adj_list = adj_lists$union, treatment = "treat.FEMA_nDis")

df <- res$df |> mutate(treat.FEMA.adj = replace_na(treat.FEMA.adj, 1))

per_year_summary <- df |> group_by(TAX_YEAR) |>
      summarise(
            n_1 = sum(treat.FEMA.adj == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
            n_0 = sum(treat.FEMA.adj == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
            n = n())

paste("Treated")
quantile(per_year_summary$n_1, probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

paste("Control")
quantile(per_year_summary$n_0, probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

paste("Total")
quantile(per_year_summary$n, probs = seq(0,1,0.1))

# 1859 is New York County
df$treat.FEMA.adj[((df$CountyID == 1859) & (df$TAX_YEAR == 2001))] <- NA # note they were untreated before so don't have to correct above
# df[((df$CountyID == 1859) & (df$TAX_YEAR == 2001)),]

# Adding spatially varying coefficients
df <- add_SVC(df, num_E_vec = 100)
df$lat <- NULL
df$lng <- NULL

df$geoid_2010 <- NULL
df$treat.FEMA_nDis <- NULL
# https://stackoverflow.com/questions/74815244/panelmatch-r-errors-please-convert-time-id-to-consecutive-integers-and-pleas
panel_df <- PanelData(panel.data = as.data.frame(df),
                      unit.id = "CountyID",
                      time.id = "TAX_YEAR",
                      treatment = "treat.FEMA.adj",
                      outcome = "TOT_REV")

# rm(df)
# saveRDS(panel_df, "panel_data/int_panelV1.rds") # No SVC, exposed treatment = 1
# saveRDS(panel_df, "panel_data/int_panelV2.rds") # With SVC, exposed treatment = 1

# DisplayTreatment(panel.data = panel_df, legend.position = "none", xlab = "TAX_YEAR", ylab = "County Code", hide.x.tick.label = TRUE, hide.y.tick.label = TRUE, dense.plot = TRUE)
```

## Matching Methods - Config 1, No SVC
### Lag = 3
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV1.rds")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/no_svc/int_panelV1/config1/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/no_svc/int_panelV1/config1/NSEW_"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# Print information about matching and balances
# summary(matches_list$none)
# summary(matches_list$ps.match)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
# summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)
# 
# plot(matches_list$ps.match)
#print(matches_list$none)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# # panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV1.rds")
# extracted_matches <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, "extracted_", save_name, ".rds"))
# # plot(extracted_matches$CBPS.weight, panel.data = panel_df, include.missing = FALSE)
# names(extracted_matches$CBPS.weight)
# extracted_matches$CBPS.weight$`1.1995`
# extracted_matches$CBPS.match$`1.1995`
# weights(extracted_matches$CBPS.weight)
# weights(extracted_matches$ps.match)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.15), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.15), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.15), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.15), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```


My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA", "REGION_MIDWEST", "REGION_NORTHEAST", "REGION_SOUTH", "REGION_WEST")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
```

```{r}
ylims <- list("base" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "ntee" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "loc" = c(-0.15,0.2), "unrefined" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "all" = c(-0.2, 0.2))
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                              ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                              ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims[["unrefined"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

# p_none$base
# # p_ps.match$base_unrefined
# p_ps.match$base
# p_cbps.match$base
# p_ps.weight$base
# p_cbps.weight$base
# 
# p_none$ntee
# # p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
# p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
# p_cbps.weight$ntee
# 
p_none$loc
# p_ps.match$loc_unrefined
p_ps.match$loc
p_cbps.match$loc
p_ps.weight$loc
p_cbps.weight$loc
# 
# p_none$all
# # p_ps.match$all_unrefined
# p_ps.match$all
# p_cbps.match$all
# p_ps.weight$all
# p_cbps.weight$all
```

```{r}
quantile(signif(abs(bal_none$value[bal_cbps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.weight$value[bal_cbps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
```



### Lag = 5
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV1.rds")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 5 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/no_svc/int_panelV1/config1/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/no_svc/int_panelV1/config1/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# Print information about matching and balances
summary(matches_list$none)
summary(matches_list$ps.match)
summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)

plot(matches_list$none)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# plot(extract(matches_list$CBPS.weight), panel.data = panel_df)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE, 
#      main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (No Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.1), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```


My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))

ylims <- c(-0.2,0.06)
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims, 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims,
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims, 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims, 
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims,
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims,
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims,
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims,
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims,
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims,
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims,
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

p_none$base
# p_ps.match$base_unrefined
p_ps.match$base
p_cbps.match$base
p_ps.weight$base
p_cbps.weight$base

# p_none$ntee
# # p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
# p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
# p_cbps.weight$ntee
```


### Matching Methods - Config 1, with SVC
### Lag = 3
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV1.rds")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/int_panelV2/config1/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/with_svc/int_panelV2/config1/NSEW_"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# # Print information about matching and balances
# summary(matches_list$none)
# summary(matches_list$ps.match)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
# summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
# summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)
# 
# plot(matches_list$ps.match)
# #print(matches_list$none)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# # panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV1.rds")
# extracted_matches <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, "extracted_", save_name, ".rds"))
# # plot(extracted_matches$CBPS.weight, panel.data = panel_df, include.missing = FALSE)
# names(extracted_matches$CBPS.weight)
# extracted_matches$CBPS.weight$`1.1995`
# extracted_matches$CBPS.match$`1.1995`
# weights(extracted_matches$CBPS.weight)
# weights(extracted_matches$ps.match)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.15), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.15), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.15), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.15), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```


My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA", "REGION_MIDWEST", "REGION_NORTHEAST", "REGION_SOUTH", "REGION_WEST")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
```

```{r}
ylims <- list("base" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "ntee" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "loc" = c(-0.15,2), "unrefined" = c(-0.15, 0.05), "all" = c(-0.2, 0.2))
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                              ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                              ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims[["unrefined"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims[["base"]], 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims[["ntee"]],
                                  ylim_loc = ylims[["loc"]],
                                  ylim_all = ylims[["all"]],
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

# p_none$base
# # p_ps.match$base_unrefined
# p_ps.match$base
# p_cbps.match$base
# p_ps.weight$base
# p_cbps.weight$base
# 
# p_none$ntee
# # p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
# p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
# p_cbps.weight$ntee
# 
p_none$loc
# p_ps.match$loc_unrefined
p_ps.match$loc
p_cbps.match$loc
p_ps.weight$loc
p_cbps.weight$loc
# 
# p_none$all
# # p_ps.match$all_unrefined
# p_ps.match$all
# p_cbps.match$all
# p_ps.weight$all
# p_cbps.weight$all
```

```{r}
quantile(signif(abs(bal_none$value[bal_cbps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
quantile(signif(abs(bal_cbps.weight$value[bal_cbps.weight$unrefined == FALSE]), 3))
```




### Lag = 5
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV1.rds")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 5 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/int_panelV2/config1/"
folder_path_balance <- "balances/with_svc/int_panelV2/config1/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

# Retrieve the PanelBalance objects
balances_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_balance, save_name, ".rds"))

# Make the balances for each lag easy to work with as a dataframe
bal_df <- lapply(balances_list, summary)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, as.data.frame)
bal_df <- lapply(bal_df, tibble::rownames_to_column, var = "time")

# Print information about matching and balances
summary(matches_list$none)
summary(matches_list$ps.match)
summary(matches_list$CBPS.match)
summary(matches_list$ps.weight)
summary(matches_list$CBPS.weight)

plot(matches_list$ps.match)
#print(matches_list$none)
```


Default Matching Weights Plots
```{r}
# # panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV1.rds")
# extracted_matches <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, "extracted_", save_name, ".rds"))
# # plot(extracted_matches$CBPS.weight, panel.data = panel_df, include.missing = FALSE)
# names(extracted_matches$CBPS.weight)
# extracted_matches$CBPS.weight$`1.1995`
# extracted_matches$CBPS.match$`1.1995`
# weights(extracted_matches$CBPS.weight)
# weights(extracted_matches$ps.match)
```


Default Scatter Plots
```{r}
plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.15), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.15), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Matching)")
plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.15), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (PS Weighting)")
plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "scatter", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = TRUE,
     ylim = c(-0.01,.15), main = "Standardized Mean Difference of Covariates (CBPS Weighting)")
```


Default Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
# plot(balances_list$none, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = FALSE, legend = TRUE, main = "No Matching") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Matching", main.unrefined = "PS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.match, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Matching", main.unrefined = "CBPS Matching (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$ps.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "PS Weighting", main.unrefined = "PS Weighting (unrefined)") 
# plot(balances_list$CBPS.weight, type = "panel", include.unrefined.panel = TRUE, legend = FALSE, main = "CBPS Weighting", main.unrefined = "CBPS Weighting (unrefined)") 
```


My Covariate Balance Plots
```{r}
covs_to_check <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population", "TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", "NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA")

bal_none <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$none, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.match <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.match, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_ps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$ps.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))
bal_cbps.weight <- tidy_bal_df(bal_data = bal_df$CBPS.weight, covariates = paste0("m.out.",covs_to_check))

ylims <- c(-0.2,0.06)
p_none <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_none,
                              match_method = "No Matching",
                              ylim_base = ylims, 
                              ylim_ntee = ylims,
                              include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.match, 
                                  match_method = "PS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims, 
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims, 
                                  ylim_unrefined = ylims,
                                  include.unrefined.panel = TRUE)
p_cbps.match <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.match,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Matching",
                                  ylim_base = ylims,
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims,
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_ps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_ps.weight,
                                  match_method = "PS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims,
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims,
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)
p_cbps.weight <- no_int_no_SVC_plots(bal_cbps.weight,
                                  match_method = "CBPS Weighting",
                                  ylim_base = ylims,
                                  ylim_ntee = ylims,
                                  include.unrefined.panel = FALSE)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)

p_none$base
# p_ps.match$base_unrefined
p_ps.match$base
p_cbps.match$base
p_ps.weight$base
p_cbps.weight$base

# p_none$ntee
# # p_ps.match$ntee_unrefined
# p_ps.match$ntee
# p_cbps.match$ntee
# p_ps.weight$ntee
# p_cbps.weight$ntee
```




## Estimates
```{r, message = F}
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(fastDummies)

df <- readRDS("county_long.rds")
df <- df |> 
      group_by(geoid_2010) |>
      mutate(CountyID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()

outcome_vars <- grep("^REV_", names(df), value = TRUE)

df <- df |> dplyr::select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "treat.FEMA_nDis", "TOT_REV"), outcome_vars)))

# log transform
# saveRDS(df |> filter(if_any(all_of(c("TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET", outcome_vars)), ~ .x < 0)), "misc_analysis/no_intV1_negative_stratified.rds")
df <- df |> mutate(across(all_of(c("TOT_REV", outcome_vars)), ~ if_else(.x < 0, 0, .x)))
df <- df |> mutate(across(all_of(c("TOT_REV", outcome_vars)), log1p)) #log1p adds 1 first to avoid 0s

df$treat.FEMA_nDis[((df$CountyID == 1859) & (df$TAX_YEAR == 2001))] <- NA
df <- df |> rename(treat.FEMA.adj = treat.FEMA_nDis)
# https://stackoverflow.com/questions/74815244/panelmatch-r-errors-please-convert-time-id-to-consecutive-integers-and-pleas

panel_df <- PanelData(panel.data = as.data.frame(df),
                      unit.id = "CountyID",
                      time.id = "TAX_YEAR",
                      treatment = "treat.FEMA.adj",
                      outcome = "TOT_REV")
# 
# panel_df2 <- as.data.frame(readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV2.rds"))
# 
# all.equal(as.data.frame(panel_df) |> dplyr::select("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "TOT_REV"),
#           panel_df2 |> dplyr::select("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "TOT_REV"))

rm(df)
```
### Without Matching
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/int_panelV2/config1/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV2.rds")

# Do we get significant results if we don't do any matching?
res <- PanelEstimate(sets = matches_list$none,
                     panel.data = panel_df,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = TRUE,
                     num.cores = 6)
plot(res)
summary(res)
```


### With Matching
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/int_panelV2/config1/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))

panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/int_panelV2.rds")

# Winner: CBPS Weighting, no SVC Coefficients
res <- PanelEstimate(sets = matches_list$CBPS.weight,
                     panel.data = panel_df,
                     se.method = "bootstrap",
                     parallel = FALSE,
                     num.cores = 6)
plot(res)
summary(res)
```

```{r}
# Winner: CBPS Weighting, no SVC Coefficients
res.uncond <- PanelEstimate(sets = matches_list$CBPS.weight,
                     panel.data = panel_df,
                     se.method = "unconditional")
plot(res.uncond)
summary(res.uncond)
```

## Choosing the number of SVC
```{r}
library(data.table)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(haven)
library(geosphere)
source("matches_helper.R")
library(fields)
library(MASS)

df <- readRDS("county_long.rds")
df <- df |> 
      group_by(geoid_2010) |>
      mutate(CountyID = as.integer(cur_group_id())) |>
      ungroup()

# These are some socioeconomic covariates we may evaluate balance for but need to convert from string to num
covs_to_check <- c("white_perc", "bachelors_perc", "poverty_perc", "unemployment", "med_family_income_adj", "med_household_income_adj", "total_population")
df <- df |> mutate(across(all_of(covs_to_check), as.numeric)) # make sure these are numeric

# These are the variables we will assess balance for
se_vars <- c("bachelors_perc", "med_household_income_adj", "white_perc",  "total_population")
other_vars <- c("TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET")
ntee_vars <- c("NTEEV2_ART", "NTEEV2_EDU", "NTEEV2_ENV", "NTEEV2_HEL", "NTEEV2_HMS", "NTEEV2_HOS", "NTEEV2_IFA", "NTEEV2_MMB", "NTEEV2_PSB", "NTEEV2_REL", "NTEEV2_UNI", "NTEEV2_UNU", "NTEEV2_NA")

df <- df |> dplyr::select(all_of(c(c("CountyID", "TAX_YEAR", "geoid_2010", "treat.FEMA_nDis", "lat", "lng"), se_vars, other_vars, ntee_vars)))

df <- df |> mutate(TOT_REV = case_when(TOT_REV < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_REV),
                   TOT_ASSET = case_when(TOT_ASSET < 0 ~ 0,
                                       .default = TOT_ASSET))
df <- df |> mutate(across(c("TOT_REV", "TOT_ASSET"), log1p)) #log1p adds 1 first to avoid 0s

library(data.table)
df <- arrange(df, TAX_YEAR)
df.lag <- shift(df[,7:ncol(df)], n = 1:3, give.names = TRUE)
df <- bind_cols(df, df.lag)
rm(df.lag)

df <- df |> filter(TAX_YEAR >= 1994)

# Create new treatment variable that takes a distance-based cutoff adjustment
adj_lists <- create_adj_list(panel_data = df, dist_cutoff = 25)
res <- add_exposed(panel_data = df, adj_list = adj_lists$union, treatment = "treat.FEMA_nDis")

df <- res$df |> mutate(treat.FEMA.adj = replace_na(treat.FEMA.adj, 1))
sum(is.na(df$treat.FEMA.adj))

# Spatially Varying Coeffs model setup
df_sub <- df |> dplyr::select(CountyID, lat, lng) |> unique()

x <- cbind(df_sub$lat, df_sub$lng) # inputs: latitude and longitude
d <- rdist(x)
K <- Matern(d, smoothness=.5) # for smoothness paramter, should we do some sort of optimization?
E <- eigen(K)

options(repr.plot.width = 6, repr.plot.height = 4)
for (num_svc in seq(10,100,10)){
      x_s <- cbind(x[,1] * E$vectors[,1:num_svc], x[,2] * E$vectors[,1:num_svc]) # would have to play around with this number
      
      # add SVC back into panel data
      xs_vars <- paste0("x_s", seq_len(ncol(x_s)))
      colnames(x_s) <- xs_vars
      df_sub.temp <- cbind(df_sub, x_s)
      
      df.temp <- merge(df, df_sub.temp |> dplyr::select(-lat, -lng), by = "CountyID", all = TRUE)
      
      upper_formula <- paste(
        "treat.FEMA.adj ~ TAX_YEAR + bachelors_perc + med_household_income_adj + white_perc + total_population +",
        paste(ntee_vars, collapse = " + "), "+",
        paste(xs_vars, collapse = " + "))
      
      # regression
      ls <- glm(as.formula(upper_formula), data = df.temp, family = binomial(link = "logit"))
      summary(ls)

      yweight <- predict(ls, type="response")
      
      png(filename = paste0("svc_plots/int/svc", num_svc*2, ".png"))
      plot(sort(yweight), main = paste("# SVC =", num_svc*2), cex = 0.10)
      dev.off() # decided on 60... maybe 80 is the slightest bit smoother but if we do 60 its same for both
}
```

## For Testing



# Computing Estimates and SE myself
```{r}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(PanelMatch)
library(ggplot2)
library(writexl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(khroma)
source("matches_helper.R")

# Set up the folder path and saved object names
L = 3 # lag, options: 1, 3, 5
folder_path_match <- "matches/with_svc/no_int_panelV2/config1/"
save_name <- paste0("Lag", L)

# Retrieve the PanelMatch objects
matches_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, save_name, ".rds"))
msets_list <- readRDS(paste0(folder_path_match, "extracted_", save_name, ".rds"))

# Winner: CBPS Matching with SVC Coefficients
m.out <- matches_list$CBPS.match
msets <- msets_list$CBPS.match

panel_df <- readRDS("panel_data/no_int_panelV2.rds")
panel_df <- as.data.frame(panel_df) |> select(CountyID, TAX_YEAR, TOT_REV)

lead <- 1
num.treated <- length(names(msets))
treated.units <- names(msets)
```

```{r}
# https://chatgpt.com/share/69b9d05d-da30-8003-9e25-56b7953f1e0e
df <- tibble(treated.units) |> 
      separate(treated.units, into = c("CountyID", "t"), sep = "\\.") |>
      mutate(key = paste(CountyID, t, sep = "."),
             CountyID = as.integer(CountyID),
```
